concepts.title: {Graduate Name}
concepts.subtitle: Class of {Year}
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grad_portrait.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo g1 (grad_portrait.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Signature Edition centers it with symmetrical balance and generous whitespace, framed with restraint in #C9A84C on #C9A84C — timeless, so this graduation still feels right in ten years. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: pride. Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
concepts.purchasePsychology: The version most families choose — timeless and universally loved. A natural centerpiece for a graduation party. Recommended as a Standard print. Made for the graduate and immediate family. (graduation)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Central hero with a disciplined supporting grid

colorRecipe.guidance: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline
typographyRecipe.guidance: Classic, confident hierarchy; distance- and print-readable.

sharePreview.headline: Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
sharePreview.caption: I can’t believe this came from our photos. 😮
sharePreview.altText: A Signature Edition CelebrateBanner graduation design, centered on the chosen hero photo with 3 supporting photos.

Luxury Gold lifts it into a cinematic spotlight with luxurious negative space and gold framing in #C9A84C, so the graduation feels as big as it was. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: pride. Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Best displayed as a framed keepsake; the gold reads richest at a large size, so it looks strongest at 24×36. Recommended as a Framed. Made for the graduate and immediate family. (graduation)

typographyRecipe.guidance: Formal and radiant; the most decorative type voice, still restrained.

concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grad_portrait.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo g1 (grad_portrait.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Modern Editorial gives it magazine-cover scale and deliberate asymmetry, with bold negative space and strong type — the graduation, styled like a cover. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: pride. Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Made to share — it looks strongest on a phone screen and social feed before it ever reaches a wall. Recommended as a Digital download. Made for the graduate and immediate family. (graduation)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Editorial asymmetry with an oversized hero

colorRecipe.guidance: Sharpest contrast, a single disciplined accent; gold as highlight only.

typographyRecipe.labelTreatment: bold sans labels; refined serif accent
typographyRecipe.guidance: Type as composition; strong scale contrast, magazine-grade.
